title: pilosella × bifurca subsp. breitenbrunnensis
intro: Pilosella × bifurca subsp. breitenbrunnensis is a rare, sterile hybrid plant, specifically a cross between Pilosella bifurca and Pilosella officinarum. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Pilosella × bifurca subsp. breitenbrunnensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support immune function, alleviate digestive issues, and promote overall well-being.
